Bash(cd "/c/Users/Sporte/Antigravity/Mandato Desk 2026"

python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request, ssl

with open\('supabase/migrations/001_complete_schema.sql', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    sql = f.read\(\)

payload = json.dumps\({'query': sql}\).encode\('utf-8'\)

req = urllib.request.Request\(
    'https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/nevgnvrwqaoztefnyqdj/database/query',
    data=payload,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer sbp_c464a97d69df1c84134b0e6ad228a28d55b1162d',
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    },
    method='POST'
\)

ctx = ssl.create_default_context\(\)
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=120, context=ctx\) as resp:
        result = resp.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
        print\(result[:2000]\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\(f'HTTP Error {e.code}:', e.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)[:2000]\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)
